---
title: "ACIC 2025 poster accepted"
date: 2025-04-11
description: "Poster Presentation. Using causal inference to unmask racial discrimination in traffic enforcement via proxies has been accepted for ACIC 2025 in Detroit."
categories:
  - talks
  - policing
---

My poster, _"Using Causal Inference to Unmask Racial Discrimination in Traffic Enforcement via Proxies,"_ has been accepted for presentation at ACIC 2025 in Detroit.
